heading: Subscription to stock
label: 290i–6 Subscription to stock
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFunctions of President under subsec. (a) delegated to Secretary of the Treasury, see Ex. Ord. No. 12403, , 48 F.R. 6087.Feb. 8, 1983

children.heading: Authorization of United States subscription to stock
children.label: a Authorization of United States subscription to stock
children.text: The President is authorized to agree to subscribe on behalf of the United States to twenty-nine thousand eight hundred and twenty shares of the capital stock of the Bank: , That the subscription shall be effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.Provided, however

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury of the initial United States subscription to twenty-nine thousand eight hundred and twenty shares of the capital stock of the Bank, $359,733,570: , That not more than $17,986,679 of such sum may be made available for paid in subscriptions to the Bank for each of the fiscal years 1982, 1983, and 1984.Provided, however

children.heading: Distributions by Bank
children.label: c Distributions by Bank
children.text: Any payment or distributions of moneys from the Bank to the United States shall be covered into the Treasury as a miscellaneous receipt.
